mapper.select:
SELECT p.id, p.project_name 'projectName', p.description 'desc', p.owner_id 'ownerId', su.nick_name 'ownerName', p.created_at 'createdAt', p.updated_at 'updatedAt', pm_agg.memberIds as members FROM project p left join sys_user su on p.owner_id = su.id and su.deleted = 0 left join ( select pm.project_id, group_concat(distinct pm.user_id) 'memberIds' from project_member pm group by pm.project_id )pm_agg on pm_agg.project_id = p.id WHERE p.deleted = 0
AND p.project_name like CONCAT('%', #{projectQueryQo.projectName}, '%')
AND su.nick_name like CONCAT('%', #{projectQueryQo.ownerName}, '%')
order by p.created_at desc
